description: Polish the docs UI layout, alignment, and spacing to achieve a more visually refined neobrutalist design. Fixes 14 specific issues covering vertical rhythm consistency, hero section spacing, grid gaps, code block alignment, sidebar jitter, breadcrumb spacing, footer press effects, table hover intensity, callout padding, card gaps, step indicator alignment, tab trigger connection, accordion item gaps, and file tree indentation.

userStories.title: Standardize MDX vertical rhythm
userStories.description: As a docs reader, I want consistent vertical spacing between all block-level elements so that the page has an even, predictable reading rhythm.
acceptanceCriteria: h2 uses mt-12 mb-4 (was mt-10 mb-3)
h3 uses mt-8 mb-3 (was mt-8 mb-2)
p uses mb-5 (was mb-4)
ul and ol use mb-5 (was mb-4)
Tabs root uses my-6 (was my-4)
All block-level MDX components (code blocks, callouts, cards, tabs, accordions, steps, tables) share my-6 vertical margin
cd docs && bun run build passes (next build)
userStories.notes:
Edit docs/mdx-components.tsx. Changes:
- Line 91: h2 change mt-10 mb-3 to mt-12 mb-4
- Line 94: h3 change mt-8 mb-2 to mt-8 mb-3
- Line 106: p change mb-4 to mb-5
- Line 109: ul change mb-4 to mb-5
- Line 112: ol change mb-4 to mb-5

Also edit docs/components/retro-tabs.tsx line 66: change my-4 to my-6 on the RadixTabs.Root className.

Do NOT change code blocks (already my-6), callouts (already my-6), cards (my-8 is intentional for larger visual weight), accordions (already my-6), or steps (already my-6).

userStories.title: Fix hero section spacing progression
userStories.description: As a visitor on the home page, I want harmonious vertical spacing in the hero section so the badge, heading, description, and buttons flow naturally.
acceptanceCriteria: Badge-to-h1 gap is mb-6 (was mb-4)
h1-to-description gap remains mb-6
Description-to-buttons gap is mb-8 (was mb-10)
Badge vertical padding is py-1.5 (was py-1)
cd docs && bun run build passes (next build)
userStories.notes:
Edit docs/app/page.tsx.
- Line 53: change mb-4 to mb-6 and py-1 to py-1.5 on the badge div
- Line 61: change mb-10 to mb-8 on the description p element
The h1 mb-6 on line 56 stays unchanged.

userStories.title: Increase feature cards grid gap
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want the feature cards on the home page to have more breathing room so the grid doesn't feel cramped.
acceptanceCriteria: Features grid uses gap-6 (was gap-4)
cd docs && bun run build passes (next build)
userStories.notes: Edit docs/app/page.tsx line 81: change gap-4 to gap-6 in the features grid div className.

userStories.title: Fix code block floating copy button overlap
userStories.description: As a docs reader, I want the floating copy button on titleless code blocks to not overlap the first line of code.
acceptanceCriteria: Floating copy button uses top-3 right-3 (was top-2 right-2)
cd docs && bun run build passes (next build)
userStories.notes: Edit docs/components/retroui-codeblock.tsx line 112: change 'absolute top-2 right-2 z-10' to 'absolute top-3 right-3 z-10'.

userStories.title: Fix sidebar active link text jitter
userStories.description: As a docs reader, I want sidebar links to not shift horizontally when navigating between pages, eliminating the jitter caused by the active state's left border.
acceptanceCriteria: All sidebar and mobile drawer links have a transparent 4px left border by default
Active sidebar links override the transparent border with the primary-foreground color
Text alignment is identical between active and inactive sidebar links
cd docs && bun run build passes (next build)

userStories.title: Add breadcrumb bottom spacing
userStories.description: As a docs reader, I want consistent spacing between the breadcrumb and the page title.
acceptanceCriteria: Breadcrumb nav element has mb-4 class
cd docs && bun run build passes (next build)
userStories.notes:
Edit docs/components/retro-page-breadcrumb.tsx line 19: add mb-4 to the <nav> element. Change from:
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
to:
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb" className="mb-4">

userStories.title: Fix footer press effect diagonal shift
userStories.description: As a docs reader, I want the prev/next footer cards to press straight down (Y-axis only) like all other interactive elements in the design system, instead of diagonally.
acceptanceCriteria: Footer prev link active state uses translate-y-1.5 only (no translate-x)
Footer next link active state uses translate-y-1.5 only (no translate-x)
active:shadow-none is preserved
cd docs && bun run build passes (next build)
userStories.notes:
Edit docs/components/retro-page-footer.tsx.
- Line 39 (previous link): change 'active:translate-x-1 active:translate-y-2 active:shadow-none' to 'active:translate-y-1.5 active:shadow-none'
- Line 50 (next link): same change — remove active:translate-x-1, change active:translate-y-2 to active:translate-y-1.5

userStories.title: Reduce table row hover intensity
userStories.description: As a docs reader, I want table row hover highlights to be subtle rather than competing with the primary-colored header row.
acceptanceCriteria: Table tr hover uses bg-primary/15 (was bg-primary/50)
hover:text-primary-foreground is removed from table tr
cd docs && bun run build passes (next build)
userStories.notes:
Edit docs/mdx-components.tsx line 151-155. The tr element currently has:
'hover:bg-primary/50 hover:text-primary-foreground border-b transition-colors'
Change to:
'hover:bg-primary/15 border-b transition-colors'

userStories.title: Improve callout internal spacing
userStories.description: As a docs reader, I want callouts to have more breathing room between the title and body text, and slightly more internal padding.
acceptanceCriteria: Callout container uses p-5 (was p-4)
Callout title uses mb-2 (was mb-1)
cd docs && bun run build passes (next build)
userStories.notes:
Edit docs/mdx-components.tsx.
- Line 31: change p-4 to p-5 in the callout container div
- Line 32: change mb-1 to mb-2 on the title p element

userStories.title: Increase MDX Cards grid gap
userStories.description: As a docs reader, I want more space between cards in the MDX Cards grid to better distinguish individual cards.
acceptanceCriteria: RetroCards grid uses gap-5 (was gap-4)
cd docs && bun run build passes (next build)
userStories.notes: Edit docs/mdx-components.tsx line 81: change gap-4 to gap-5 in the RetroCards div className.

userStories.title: Fix step indicator vertical alignment
userStories.description: As a docs reader, I want step number indicators to align vertically with the step's heading text rather than sitting above it.
acceptanceCriteria: Step indicator ::before pseudo-element uses top: 2rem (was top: 0)
Step indicator visually aligns with the first heading line in each step
cd docs && bun run build passes (next build)
userStories.notes: Edit docs/app/global.css line 329: change 'top: 0;' to 'top: 2rem;' in the .retro-step::before rule. This aligns the indicator with the h3 heading that typically starts each step (h3 has mt-8 = 2rem).

userStories.title: Add bottom border to tab trigger list
userStories.description: As a docs reader, I want tab triggers to visually connect to their content panel via a bottom border line, instead of floating above the content.
acceptanceCriteria: TabsList has a border-b-2 border-border bottom border
The visual gap between triggers and content panel feels connected
cd docs && bun run build passes (next build)
userStories.notes:
Edit docs/components/retro-tabs.tsx line 75. Change the RadixTabs.List className from:
'not-prose flex flex-row space-x-2'
to:
'not-prose flex flex-row space-x-2 border-b-2 border-border pb-0'

The active triggers already have border-2 border-border which will visually merge with this bottom line. Also consider adding -mb-[2px] to each trigger so the active trigger's bottom border overlaps the list border, creating the classic connected tab look. To do this, add '-mb-[2px]' to the trigger className on line 81.

userStories.title: Increase accordion item gap
userStories.description: As a docs reader, I want more space between accordion items so their shadows don't crowd each other.
acceptanceCriteria: RetroAccordions uses gap-3 (was gap-2)
cd docs && bun run build passes (next build)
userStories.notes: Edit docs/components/retro-accordion.tsx line 12: change gap-2 to gap-3 in the RetroAccordions className.

userStories.title: Add file tree root indentation
userStories.description: As a docs reader, I want root-level items in the file tree to have a slight left indent that matches the visual language of nested items.
acceptanceCriteria: RetroFiles container has ps-1 (1 unit left padding added)
Root-level files and folders align with the visual tree indentation pattern
cd docs && bun run build passes (next build)
userStories.notes:
Edit docs/components/retro-files.tsx line 10: change 'not-prose border-border bg-card border-2 p-2 shadow-md' to 'not-prose border-border bg-card border-2 p-2 ps-3 shadow-md'.

ps-3 (12px) provides enough indent to visually match the nested items' ms-2 + ps-2 (16px) pattern without making root items look over-indented.
